name: Skywealth Group Inc.
summary: Humanatare Distribution Corp finances and distributes life-saving healthcare products. It offers products to eradicate various diseases, such as Tuberculosis in the developing world. Humanatare Distribution Corp was formerly known as TIE Technologies, Inc. and changed its name to Humanatare Distribution Corp in July 2012. The company was incorporated in 1980 and is based in Charlotte, North Carolina.
